name: adversyn-trading-ui
purpose: Live trading UI (React/Vite). Served as static dist by trading-ui.service on port 8888.
safety_notes: PRODUCTION EC2 MUST NEVER BUILD. Vite + esbuild + Rollup CPU-pin the box. Two prior incidents required AWS Console hard reboots.
Build happens locally on Darren's box (Windows) or in CI. EC2 only receives a tarball and runs deploy_trading_dist.sh.
Agent must edit source only. Never run npm install / npm run build. CI is the validation layer.
Never auto-deploy. Always require Darren approval (status:needs-human-approval) for any deploy-related task.
